name: noacg-player-host
description: NoaCG Studio's Remotion Player host: a standalone iframe bundle that previews AI/user-authored video compositions. Kept as its own package - built into public/player-host/ and served as a static asset - so the Remotion dependency (source-available, company license above 3 employees - see https://remotion.dev/license) never enters the AGPL app bundle. Talks to the app ONLY via postMessage; loaded with sandbox=allow-scripts (opaque origin), so the untrusted composition code it evaluates can never reach the app's localStorage or session.
